description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Generate documentation that runs on push to main, on pull requests to main, and on workflow dispatch. Use a macos-14 job to check out the repository, set up dependencies, install awscli, doxygen, and graphviz, then build and generate documentation for C++, Slice, JavaScript, and Swift. Finally, sync the generated documentation to S3 using aws s3 sync, but only for the main branch and not on pull requests.
